# Footer
Site footer with brand, navigation links, and social link.
## Import
```tsx
import { Footer } from "@/components/ui/footer";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Footer brand="Aurora UI" text={undefined} radius={undefined} spinDuration={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **brand** (string) — default: `"Aurora UI"`: Brand
- **text** (string): Text
- **radius** (number): Radius
- **spinDuration** (number): Spin (s)
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add footer
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/footer
```
